description_long: This is an old, hardbound book with a marbled brown and tan cover, accented by a dark brown leather spine and corners. The marbled pattern is dense and organic, giving the book a vintage or antique appearance. The spine features raised bands, typical of traditional bookbinding, and the leather shows some wear, suggesting age and use. On the back cover, there is a small white label with handwritten text, possibly for cataloging or archival purposes. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with visible yellowed pages when viewed from the side. There are no visible illustrations or artwork on the front cover, and the overall design is utilitarian and classic.
description: An antique hardbound book with a marbled brown cover and dark leather spine, featuring a small handwritten label on the back.
description_view_0: The front cover displays a dense marbled brown and tan pattern with a dark brown leather spine on the left edge.
description_view_1: The book is seen edge-on, showing the yellowed pages and the thickness of the volume.
description_view_2: The back cover mirrors the marbled pattern and includes a small white handwritten label near the bottom.
description_view_3: The spine is fully visible, showing dark brown leather with raised bands and some signs of wear.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is covered in dark brown leather with raised horizontal bands and shows some wear. No visible text or decorative elements are present.

license_info.creator_display_name: Ruth Lilly Medical Library, IU School of Medicine
